ksa_text: Manage ongoing data and AI program operations, including monitoring execution schedules, coordinating responses to operational issues, automating routine operations, and capacity planning for anticipated resource needs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to execute technology integration processes.

nice.top_element_label: Skill in executing command line tools

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Operations & Program Management is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Products. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Operations & Program Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.434). External validation of this task KSA for the Director of Data Products role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: PMI, TOGAF operational frameworks, and CDO survey data (NewVantage Partners) confirm operational program management as a key competency for data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Operations & Program Management for the Director of Data Products is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Operations & Program Management task KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Products at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
